title: Barter markets in everything
subtitle: A clean house in return for your data?: We record first-person cleaning footage to help train the next generation of household robots. That data is valuable enough for us to offer cleaning services free of charge for a limited time. Here is the link, via Glenn Mercer. The post Barter markets in everything appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION .
contentHtml:
A clean house in return for your data?:

We record first-person cleaning footage to help train the next generation of household robots. That data is valuable enough for us to offer cleaning services free of charge for a limited time.

Here is the link, via Glenn Mercer.

The post Barter markets in everything appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION.
